creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 210406
svn(1) diff against the ports tree

This fixes spatch immediately segfaulting on -CURRENT at the very least.

1.0.8 was released back in September, but the sources aren't fetchable at the moment and 1.0.7 is sufficient for my purposes. The pyml patches added have been submitted upstream.

Q/A:
* testport: OK (-CURRENT/amd64)
